title: The Fountain Of Love
content:
The source of laughter lies so near to tears,
    And pain to rapture, that one fountain flows
    From forth the two Love's; in whose deeps appears
    The image of the Heaven each man knows.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "The Fountain Of Love", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
